positive: A detailed, stylized, symmetrical illustration of a cosmic fox spirit (Kitsune) sitting gracefully amidst swirling nebulae and geometric celestial bodies. The fox has vibrant, ethereal fur painted with glowing blues, magenta, and gold accents. It is surrounded by stylized constellations and crescent moons, giving the impression of a celestial portal opening beneath it. Strong contrast between the dark space background and the glowing, luminous fox. Flat graphic design style meets magical realism, perfect for screen printing on a dark garment. Minimalist use of bold outlines and clean silhouette.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, low resolution, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, realistic photo, jpeg artifacts, signatures
